_README: Bank spellings that mean the same bank but differ by more than case or
punctuation, so the build cannot merge them safely on its own.
Key = a spelling seen in the data, value = the spelling to merge it into.
Case and punctuation are already ignored, so "K-Bank" and "kbank" need no entry.
The entries below were confirmed by the BOP team on 2026-07-23.
Still unconfirmed and deliberately left separate: tcb ($22.3m), BOA ($1.3m),
ICB ($928.5m). ICB is large enough that guessing would matter.
